### AI use disclosure

<!--
We're fine with AI-assisted contributions. We don't accept PRs submitted
autonomously by an AI agent without a human reviewing the change first, and
we don't accept contributions the submitter can't explain or defend if asked.
Single-line completion, regex help, and translation don't need disclosing.
-->

- [ ] No AI was used, or only minor assistance (autocomplete, regex, translation)
- [ ] AI substantially assisted this PR — see notes below

**If AI substantially assisted:** what parts, and what did you personally review/test/understand before submitting?

<!-- your answer here -->

- [ ] I can explain and defend every change in this PR in my own words if asked
